abandoned.example_en: The old house at the end of the street looked completely abandoned.
abandoned.example_zh: 街尾那棟老房子看起來完全被遺棄了。

accidentally.example_en: I accidentally deleted the photos from my phone last night.
accidentally.example_zh: 我昨晚不小心把手機裡的照片刪掉了。

acknowledged.example_en: The teacher acknowledged that the test was harder than usual.
acknowledged.example_zh: 老師承認這次考試比平常還難。

activate.example_en: Press this button to activate the alarm system at night.
activate.example_zh: 按下這個按鈕就能在晚上啟動警報系統。

activist.example_en: The young activist gave a speech about protecting the environment.
activist.example_zh: 那位年輕的社運人士發表了一場關於保護環境的演講。

adjusted.example_en: She adjusted the chair before sitting down to study.
adjusted.example_zh: 她坐下讀書之前先調整了椅子。

allergic.example_en: My brother is allergic to peanuts, so he avoids them completely.
allergic.example_zh: 我弟弟對花生過敏，所以他完全不吃花生。

amazes.example_en: Her talent for painting always amazes everyone in the class.
amazes.example_zh: 她的繪畫天分總是讓班上每個人驚嘆。

amused.example_en: The children looked amused when the puppy chased its own tail.
amused.example_zh: 當小狗追著自己的尾巴時，孩子們看起來很開心。

ancestors.example_en: Many families visit temples to honor their ancestors during festivals.
ancestors.example_zh: 許多家庭在節慶期間會到廟裡祭拜祖先。

announced.example_en: The principal announced the winner of the speech contest.
announced.example_zh: 校長宣布了演講比賽的得獎者。

annoyed.example_en: He felt annoyed when his little sister kept interrupting him.
annoyed.example_zh: 當妹妹一直打斷他時，他感到很惱怒。

applauded.example_en: The audience applauded loudly after the students finished their play.
applauded.example_zh: 學生們表演完戲劇後，觀眾大聲鼓掌。

archaeologists.example_en: Archaeologists discovered ancient pottery buried under the old temple.
archaeologists.example_zh: 考古學家在古老寺廟下方挖出了古代陶器。

assured.example_en: The doctor assured us that the surgery was not dangerous.
assured.example_zh: 醫生向我們保證這場手術並不危險。

attached.example_en: She attached a small note to the birthday present.
attached.example_zh: 她在生日禮物上附了一張小卡片。

bakers.example_en: The bakers wake up before dawn to prepare fresh bread.
bakers.example_zh: 麵包師傅們在天亮前就起床準備新鮮麵包。

beeping.example_en: The microwave kept beeping until someone took the food out.
beeping.example_zh: 微波爐一直發出嗶嗶聲，直到有人把食物拿出來。

bent.example_en: The metal spoon bent easily when he pressed it hard.
bent.example_zh: 他用力一壓，金屬湯匙就輕易彎曲了。

bleaching.example_en: Warmer oceans are bleaching coral reefs around the world.
bleaching.example_zh: 海水升溫正使世界各地的珊瑚礁白化。

blessings.example_en: Grandmother gave us her blessings before we left for college.
blessings.example_zh: 我們去讀大學前，奶奶給了我們祝福。

blogger.example_en: The travel blogger shared photos of her trip to Japan.
blogger.example_zh: 那位旅遊部落客分享了她在日本旅行的照片。

blushes.example_en: She always blushes whenever someone compliments her singing.
blushes.example_zh: 每當有人稱讚她的歌聲，她總是會臉紅。

blushing.example_en: The boy stood there blushing after his classmates cheered for him.
blushing.example_zh: 同學們為他歡呼後，那男孩站在那裡臉紅了起來。

boredom.example_en: To fight boredom on the long trip, we played card games.
boredom.example_zh: 為了在漫長的旅途中不那麼無聊，我們玩了紙牌遊戲。

bred.example_en: These dogs were bred to help farmers herd sheep.
bred.example_zh: 這些狗被培育來幫助農夫牧羊。

breeding.example_en: Spring is the breeding season for many kinds of birds.
breeding.example_zh: 春天是許多鳥類的繁殖季節。

briefly.example_en: The coach briefly explained the new rules before the game started.
briefly.example_zh: 比賽開始前，教練簡短地說明了新規則。

brightened.example_en: Her face brightened when she saw the surprise party.
brightened.example_zh: 看到驚喜派對時，她的臉一下子亮了起來。

broth.example_en: My mother cooked the noodles in a warm chicken broth.
broth.example_zh: 我媽媽用溫熱的雞湯煮麵。

bubbles.example_en: The children laughed as they chased the soap bubbles.
bubbles.example_zh: 孩子們一邊追著肥皂泡泡一邊笑。

buds.example_en: New buds appeared on the tree branches in early spring.
buds.example_zh: 初春時樹枝上長出了新的花苞。

bumps.example_en: The road was full of bumps, so the bus shook a lot.
bumps.example_zh: 這條路坑坑巴巴的，所以公車一直搖晃。

bushes.example_en: The cat hid quietly behind the bushes in the garden.
bushes.example_zh: 那隻貓安靜地躲在花園的灌木叢後面。

calmly.example_en: The firefighter calmly explained what everyone should do.
calmly.example_zh: 消防員冷靜地說明大家該怎麼做。

candlelight.example_en: During the power outage, we ate dinner by candlelight.
candlelight.example_zh: 停電期間，我們在燭光下吃晚餐。

carotenoids.example_en: Carotenoids give carrots and pumpkins their bright orange color.
carotenoids.example_zh: 類胡蘿蔔素讓紅蘿蔔和南瓜呈現鮮豔的橘色。

carriages.example_en: In the old days, people traveled between cities in horse carriages.
carriages.example_zh: 在過去，人們搭乘馬車在城市之間旅行。

challenges.example_en: Learning a new language brings many exciting challenges.
challenges.example_zh: 學習一門新語言會帶來許多令人興奮的挑戰。

charger.example_en: I forgot to bring my phone charger on the trip.
charger.example_zh: 我這趟旅行忘了帶手機充電器。

chatting.example_en: The two friends were chatting happily on the way home.
chatting.example_zh: 那兩位朋友在回家路上開心地聊天。

cheeks.example_en: The cold wind made her cheeks turn pink.
cheeks.example_zh: 寒冷的風讓她的臉頰變得粉紅。

chewy.example_en: This bread has a chewy texture that I really enjoy.
chewy.example_zh: 這種麵包有種我很喜歡的嚼勁口感。

chlorophyll.example_en: Chlorophyll helps plants absorb sunlight to make their own food.
chlorophyll.example_zh: 葉綠素幫助植物吸收陽光來製造自己的養分。

circadian.definition: 生理時鐘的；晝夜節律的
circadian.example_en: Staying up too late can disturb your body's circadian rhythm.
circadian.example_zh: 熬夜太晚可能會打亂你身體的生理時鐘。

citywide.example_en: The mayor announced a citywide plan to plant more trees.
citywide.example_zh: 市長宣布了一項全市種植更多樹木的計畫。

closely.example_en: The teacher watched closely as the students did the experiment.
closely.example_zh: 學生們做實驗時，老師在一旁密切地觀察。

clutter.example_en: She cleared the clutter off her desk before starting homework.
clutter.example_zh: 她開始寫作業前先把桌上的雜物清乾淨。

colonies.example_en: Ants build large colonies with thousands of workers underground.
colonies.example_zh: 螞蟻在地底建造擁有數千隻工蟻的龐大群落。

combined.example_en: The two small schools combined into one bigger school.
combined.example_zh: 這兩所小學校合併成了一所更大的學校。

combining.example_en: The chef made a new dish by combining local ingredients.
combining.example_zh: 主廚結合當地食材做出了一道新菜。

commonly.example_en: This type of tree is commonly found along the mountain trails.
commonly.example_zh: 這種樹在山間步道上很常見。

compounds.example_en: Scientists study the compounds found inside volcanic rocks.
compounds.example_zh: 科學家研究火山岩中所含的化合物。

concentrating.example_en: He was concentrating so hard that he didn't hear the bell.
concentrating.example_zh: 他太過專心，以至於沒聽到鐘聲。

concentration.example_en: Loud noises can break your concentration while studying.
concentration.example_zh: 吵雜的聲音會打斷你讀書時的專注力。

confirmation.example_en: We received a confirmation email after booking the tickets.
confirmation.example_zh: 我們訂票後收到了一封確認信。

constantly.example_en: Technology is constantly changing the way students learn.
constantly.example_zh: 科技不斷地改變學生學習的方式。

convinced.example_en: She convinced her parents to let her join the trip.
convinced.example_zh: 她說服了父母讓她參加這趟旅行。

coordinator.example_en: The event coordinator arranged all the activities for the festival.
coordinator.example_zh: 活動協調者安排了這場慶典的所有活動。

copper.example_en: The old statue in the park is made of copper.
copper.example_zh: 公園裡那座古老的雕像是用銅製成的。

costumes.example_en: The students wore colorful costumes for the school play.
costumes.example_zh: 學生們穿著色彩鮮豔的戲服演出學校話劇。

cracks.example_en: There were several cracks in the old stone wall.
cracks.example_zh: 那面古老的石牆上有好幾道裂縫。

crookedly.example_en: The picture frame hung crookedly on the living room wall.
crookedly.example_zh: 那幅畫歪斜地掛在客廳的牆上。

crops.example_en: Farmers hope for enough rain to grow healthy crops this year.
crops.example_zh: 農夫們希望今年有足夠的雨水讓農作物健康生長。

crushed.example_en: She crushed the garlic before adding it to the soup.
crushed.example_zh: 她把蒜頭壓碎後加進湯裡。

decorations.example_en: We hung colorful decorations around the classroom for the party.
decorations.example_zh: 我們在教室四周掛上了色彩繽紛的裝飾品來辦派對。

defensively.example_en: He crossed his arms defensively when his friend teased him.
defensively.example_zh: 朋友取笑他時，他防禦性地抱起了雙臂。

delighted.example_en: She was delighted to receive a letter from her old classmate.
delighted.example_zh: 收到老同學的來信讓她非常高興。

demonstrated.example_en: The teacher demonstrated how to use the microscope correctly.
demonstrated.example_zh: 老師示範了如何正確使用顯微鏡。

denser.example_en: The fog became denser as we drove higher into the mountains.
denser.example_zh: 我們開車往山上走時，霧變得更濃了。

desperately.example_en: The lost puppy desperately searched for its way back home.
desperately.example_zh: 那隻走失的小狗拼命地尋找回家的路。

determined.example_en: She was determined to finish the marathon no matter what.
determined.example_zh: 她下定決心不論如何都要完成馬拉松。

devastated.example_en: The family was devastated when their old dog passed away.
devastated.example_zh: 老狗過世時，這家人感到非常悲痛。

devices.example_en: Many students now use electronic devices to study online.
devices.example_zh: 現在許多學生使用電子裝置來上網學習。

dimensional.example_en: The museum has a three-dimensional model of the solar system.
dimensional.example_zh: 這間博物館有一個太陽系的立體模型。

dioxide.example_en: Trees absorb carbon dioxide and release oxygen into the air.
dioxide.example_zh: 樹木吸收二氧化碳並將氧氣釋放到空氣中。

directly.example_en: You can walk directly to the station from the school gate.
directly.example_zh: 你可以從校門口直接走到車站。

disasters.example_en: Natural disasters like typhoons can cause serious damage.
disasters.example_zh: 颱風之類的天然災害可能造成嚴重損害。

discouraged.example_en: Don't feel discouraged if your first try doesn't succeed.
discouraged.example_zh: 如果第一次嘗試不成功，不要感到氣餒。

disturbed.example_en: The loud music disturbed the neighbors late at night.
disturbed.example_zh: 深夜的大聲音樂打擾了鄰居。

dormant.example_en: The volcano had been dormant for hundreds of years.
dormant.example_zh: 這座火山已經休眠了好幾百年。

dramatically.example_en: The temperature dropped dramatically after the sun went down.
dramatically.example_zh: 太陽下山後氣溫戲劇性地下降。

dreading.example_en: I've been dreading the math test all week.
dreading.example_zh: 我這整個星期都很害怕那場數學考試。

drip.example_en: Water began to drip from the ceiling during the storm.
drip.example_zh: 暴風雨期間，水開始從天花板滴落。

dusk.example_en: The streetlights turned on automatically at dusk.
dusk.example_zh: 路燈在黃昏時自動亮了起來。

echoes.example_en: Loud echoes bounced off the walls of the empty cave.
echoes.example_zh: 空蕩蕩的洞穴牆壁反射出響亮的回聲。

echoing.example_en: Her laughter kept echoing through the quiet hallway.
echoing.example_zh: 她的笑聲在安靜的走廊裡不斷回響。

ecosystems.example_en: Coral reefs support some of the richest ecosystems in the ocean.
ecosystems.example_zh: 珊瑚礁孕育著海洋中最豐富的生態系統之一。

efficiently.example_en: The new machine can sort recyclables more efficiently than before.
efficiently.example_zh: 這台新機器分類回收物比以前更有效率。

embarrassment.example_en: He hid his face in embarrassment after tripping on stage.
embarrassment.example_zh: 他在台上絆倒後尷尬地遮住了臉。

enclosures.example_en: The zoo built larger enclosures for the elephants last year.
enclosures.example_zh: 動物園去年為大象建了更大的圍欄。

entertaining.example_en: The magic show was both entertaining and educational for kids.
entertaining.example_zh: 這場魔術表演對孩子們來說既有趣又富教育意義。

entirely.example_en: The plan is entirely different from what we discussed before.
entirely.example_zh: 這個計畫和我們之前討論的完全不同。

eruption.example_en: The volcanic eruption forced nearby villagers to leave their homes.
eruption.example_zh: 火山爆發迫使附近的村民離開家園。

evolved.example_en: Many animals have evolved special skills to survive in the desert.
evolved.example_zh: 許多動物已演化出特殊技能以便在沙漠中生存。

exhausting.example_en: Climbing the mountain all day was exhausting but rewarding.
exhausting.example_zh: 整天爬山雖然令人筋疲力盡，卻很值得。

expires.example_en: This coupon expires at the end of the month.
expires.example_zh: 這張優惠券在月底到期。

exploded.example_en: The firework exploded into bright colors above the lake.
exploded.example_zh: 煙火在湖面上方爆開，綻放出鮮豔的色彩。

explodes.example_en: The balloon explodes with a loud pop when it gets too full.
explodes.example_zh: 氣球灌太滿時會發出一聲巨響爆開。

explorers.example_en: Early explorers sailed across the ocean to discover new lands.
explorers.example_zh: 早期的探險家橫渡海洋去發現新大陸。

exposed.example_en: The rocks were exposed after the tide went out.
exposed.example_zh: 退潮後，岩石就露了出來。

eyelids.example_en: His eyelids grew heavy as he tried to stay awake.
eyelids.example_zh: 他努力想保持清醒，但眼皮卻越來越沉重。

faded.example_en: The color of the old photograph had faded over the years.
faded.example_zh: 這張老照片的顏色經過多年已經褪色了。

fades.example_en: The music slowly fades as the movie comes to an end.
fades.example_zh: 電影接近尾聲時，音樂慢慢淡出。

falsely.example_en: The report falsely claimed that the store was closing down.
falsely.example_zh: 這則報導錯誤地聲稱那家商店即將關門。

fascinated.example_en: The children were fascinated by the stars through the telescope.
fascinated.example_zh: 孩子們透過望遠鏡看星星，感到十分著迷。

fed.example_en: She fed the stray cats near her apartment every morning.
fed.example_zh: 她每天早上餵食公寓附近的流浪貓。

fermentation.example_en: Fermentation gives yogurt its sour taste and thick texture.
fermentation.example_zh: 發酵讓優格產生酸味與濃稠的口感。

firecracker.example_en: A loud firecracker went off outside during the celebration.
firecracker.example_zh: 慶祝活動期間，外面有一個鞭炮發出巨響。

firework.example_en: Everyone cheered when the first firework lit up the sky.
firework.example_zh: 第一發煙火點亮天空時，大家都歡呼了起來。

fireworks.example_en: We watched the fireworks from the rooftop on New Year's Eve.
fireworks.example_zh: 跨年夜我們在頂樓觀賞煙火。

fishermen.example_en: The fishermen returned to the harbor early with a full catch.
fishermen.example_zh: 漁夫們一早就滿載而歸回到港口。

flickered.example_en: The candle flickered gently in the cool night breeze.
flickered.example_zh: 蠟燭在涼爽的夜風中輕輕閃爍。

flopped.example_en: After the long hike, he flopped onto the couch and slept.
flopped.example_zh: 長途健行後，他一屁股癱坐在沙發上睡著了。

flopping.example_en: The dog kept flopping onto the cool floor to stay comfortable.
flopping.example_zh: 那隻狗一直癱躺在涼爽的地板上，讓自己舒服一點。

footprint.example_en: We can reduce our carbon footprint by using less plastic.
footprint.example_zh: 我們可以透過減少使用塑膠來降低碳足跡。

fragments.example_en: Scientists found small fragments of an ancient pot near the river.
fragments.example_zh: 科學家在河邊發現了古代陶罐的小碎片。

frames.example_en: She hung several photo frames on the wall of her room.
frames.example_zh: 她在房間牆上掛了好幾個相框。

frantically.example_en: He frantically searched his bag for the missing ticket.
frantically.example_zh: 他在包包裡慌亂地翻找那張不見的票。

frustrated.example_en: She felt frustrated when her computer crashed before saving the file.
frustrated.example_zh: 電腦在存檔前當機，讓她感到很沮喪。

frustrating.example_en: It's frustrating when the bus is late every single day.
frustrating.example_zh: 公車每天都遲到，真是令人沮喪。

fungus.example_en: A strange fungus was growing on the fallen log in the forest.
fungus.example_zh: 森林裡的倒木上長出了一種奇怪的真菌。

genes.example_en: Children often inherit certain genes from both of their parents.
genes.example_zh: 孩子通常會從父母雙方遺傳到某些基因。

gently.example_en: She gently placed the baby bird back into its nest.
gently.example_zh: 她溫柔地把小鳥放回了鳥巢裡。

genuinely.example_en: He seemed genuinely happy to see his old friend again.
genuinely.example_zh: 他看起來真的很高興再次見到老朋友。

gills.example_en: Fish use their gills to breathe underwater.

giver.example_en: My grandfather was known as a generous giver in our town.
giver.example_zh: 我爺爺在我們鎮上以慷慨的給予者著稱。

goggles.example_en: We wore goggles in the science lab to protect our eyes.
goggles.example_zh: 我們在科學實驗室戴上護目鏡以保護眼睛。

goosebumps.example_en: The scary story gave me goosebumps all over my arms.
goosebumps.example_zh: 那個恐怖故事讓我全身手臂都起了雞皮疙瘩。

graffiti.example_en: Colorful graffiti covered the wall behind the old train station.
graffiti.example_zh: 色彩繽紛的塗鴉覆蓋了舊火車站後方的牆壁。

graphs.example_en: The report included several graphs showing the rise in temperature.
graphs.example_zh: 這份報告包含了幾張顯示氣溫上升的圖表。

graves.example_en: The old cemetery had rows of graves covered in fallen leaves.
graves.example_zh: 那座古老的墓園裡有一排排被落葉覆蓋的墳墓。

gravestones.example_en: Names and dates were carved into the old gravestones.
gravestones.example_zh: 古老的墓碑上刻著姓名與日期。

grinning.example_en: He walked in grinning from ear to ear about his good news.
grinning.example_zh: 他咧著嘴笑著走進來，帶著他的好消息。

groaned.example_en: The students groaned when the teacher assigned extra homework.
groaned.example_zh: 老師出額外的作業時，學生們發出了抱怨聲。

groggy.example_en: I felt groggy this morning after staying up too late.
groggy.example_zh: 今天早上因為熬夜太晚，我感覺昏昏沉沉的。

hardships.example_en: The pioneers faced many hardships during their long journey.
hardships.example_zh: 拓荒者在漫長的旅途中面臨許多艱難困苦。

helplessly.example_en: The kitten cried helplessly at the bottom of the tree.
helplessly.example_zh: 小貓在樹下無助地哭叫著。

herbs.example_en: My mother grows herbs like basil and mint on the balcony.
herbs.example_zh: 我媽媽在陽台種植羅勒和薄荷之類的香草。

hesitated.example_en: She hesitated for a moment before answering the difficult question.
hesitated.example_zh: 她在回答這道難題前猶豫了一下。

hesitation.example_en: Without hesitation, he jumped into the pool to help.
hesitation.example_zh: 他毫不猶豫地跳進泳池幫忙。

hillside.example_en: Sheep were grazing quietly on the green hillside.
hillside.example_zh: 羊群在綠色的山坡上安靜地吃草。

homemade.example_en: She brought homemade cookies to share with her classmates.
homemade.example_zh: 她帶了自製的餅乾來跟同學分享。

honestly.example_en: Honestly, I didn't expect the movie to be so exciting.
honestly.example_zh: 老實說，我沒想到這部電影會這麼精彩。

hotline.example_en: The school set up a hotline for students to report problems.
hotline.example_zh: 學校設立了一條熱線讓學生回報問題。

hugged.example_en: They hugged each other tightly at the airport before saying goodbye.
hugged.example_zh: 他們在機場道別前緊緊地擁抱彼此。

humblest.example_en: Even after winning, she remained the humblest person on the team.
humblest.example_zh: 即使獲勝，她仍是隊上最謙遜的人。

humming.example_en: She was humming her favorite song while washing the dishes.
humming.example_zh: 她一邊洗碗一邊哼著自己最喜歡的歌。

improvement.example_en: There has been a big improvement in his English speaking skills.
improvement.example_zh: 他的英語口說能力有了很大的進步。

inconvenience.example_en: We apologize for any inconvenience caused by the road construction.
inconvenience.example_zh: 我們對道路施工造成的不便表示歉意。

incredibly.example_en: The final match was incredibly close until the last minute.
incredibly.example_zh: 這場決賽直到最後一刻都難以置信地激烈。

intimidating.example_en: The huge dog looked intimidating but was actually very friendly.
intimidating.example_zh: 那隻大狗看起來令人生畏，但其實非常友善。

invest.example_en: It's smart to invest time in learning useful skills early.
invest.example_zh: 及早投資時間學習有用的技能是很明智的。

investing.example_en: The city is investing in new parks and bike paths.
investing.example_zh: 這座城市正在投資興建新公園和自行車道。

involved.example_en: Every student in the class got involved in the recycling project.
involved.example_zh: 班上每位同學都參與了這項回收計畫。

involves.example_en: The science project involves collecting water samples from the river.
involves.example_zh: 這項科學專題涉及從河裡採集水樣。

knots.example_en: The scouts learned how to tie several useful knots.
knots.example_zh: 童軍們學習了如何打好幾種實用的繩結。

laces.example_en: He bent down to tie the laces on his running shoes.
laces.example_zh: 他彎下腰綁好跑鞋的鞋帶。

larger.example_en: The new library is much larger than the old one.
larger.example_zh: 這間新圖書館比舊圖書館大得多。

lateness.example_en: The teacher was not happy about his repeated lateness this month.
lateness.example_zh: 老師對他這個月一再遲到感到不滿。

laziness.example_en: His teacher warned him that laziness would hurt his grades.
laziness.example_zh: 他的老師警告他懶惰會影響他的成績。

leash.example_en: Please keep your dog on a leash in the park.
leash.example_zh: 請在公園內用牽繩牽好你的狗。

leftover.example_en: We used the leftover rice to make fried rice for lunch.
leftover.example_zh: 我們用剩下的飯做成午餐的炒飯。

lifestyle.example_en: Eating vegetables every day is part of a healthy lifestyle.
lifestyle.example_zh: 每天吃蔬菜是健康生活方式的一部分。

limestone.example_en: The cave was formed inside a mountain made of limestone.
limestone.example_zh: 這座洞穴形成於一座石灰岩山的內部。

lit.example_en: She lit a candle to celebrate her grandmother's birthday.
lit.example_zh: 她點燃了一根蠟燭來慶祝奶奶的生日。

located.example_en: The new bookstore is located right next to the train station.
located.example_zh: 這間新書店就位於火車站旁邊。

lungs.example_en: Deep breathing exercises can help strengthen your lungs.
lungs.example_zh: 深呼吸運動有助於強化你的肺部。

magically.example_en: The messy room magically became clean after her mother's help.
magically.example_zh: 在媽媽的幫忙下，凌亂的房間神奇地變乾淨了。

maple.example_en: The maple leaves turned bright red in the autumn.
maple.example_zh: 楓葉在秋天變成了鮮豔的紅色。

marine.example_en: The aquarium protects hundreds of marine animals from the coast.
marine.example_zh: 這間水族館保護了數百種來自海岸的海洋生物。

matures.example_en: A butterfly matures fully only after leaving its cocoon.
matures.example_zh: 蝴蝶要離開繭之後才會完全成熟。

meant.example_en: I'm not sure what she meant by that strange comment.
meant.example_zh: 我不確定她那句奇怪的話是什麼意思。

melted.example_en: The ice cream melted quickly in the hot summer sun.
melted.example_zh: 冰淇淋在炎熱的夏日陽光下很快就融化了。

memorizing.example_en: He spent the whole evening memorizing new vocabulary words.
memorizing.example_zh: 他花了一整個晚上背誦新的單字。

mentioned.example_en: She mentioned that she might join the debate club next term.
mentioned.example_zh: 她提到下學期可能會加入辯論社。

midsummer.example_en: The town holds a big festival every midsummer.
midsummer.example_zh: 這座小鎮每年仲夏都會舉辦一場盛大的慶典。

midway.example_en: We stopped for lunch midway through our long drive.
midway.example_zh: 我們在漫長的車程中途停下來吃午餐。

mistakenly.example_en: He mistakenly sent the email to the wrong classmate.
mistakenly.example_zh: 他錯誤地把電子郵件寄給了不對的同學。

moldy.example_en: We threw away the moldy bread that had been left out too long.
moldy.example_zh: 我們把放太久已經發霉的麵包丟掉了。

molecules.example_en: Water is made of tiny molecules that we cannot see.
molecules.example_zh: 水是由我們看不見的微小分子組成的。

motors.example_en: The toy car uses two small motors to move its wheels.
motors.example_zh: 這輛玩具車用兩個小馬達來驅動輪子。

mumbles.example_en: He always mumbles something when he's nervous about a test.
mumbles.example_zh: 他考試緊張時總是會喃喃自語一些話。

myth.example_en: It's a common myth that we only use ten percent of our brain.
myth.example_zh: 我們只用了大腦百分之十是一個常見的迷思。

neatly.example_en: She folded her clothes neatly before putting them in the drawer.
neatly.example_zh: 她把衣服整齊地摺好後放進抽屜。

nerves.example_en: She took a deep breath to calm her nerves before the speech.
nerves.example_zh: 她在演講前深呼吸來讓自己不那麼緊張。

nervousness.example_en: His hands shook slightly from nervousness before the interview.
nervousness.example_zh: 面試前他的手因為緊張而微微顫抖。

newfound.example_en: She showed off her newfound confidence during the class debate.
newfound.example_zh: 她在班級辯論中展現出新找到的自信。

nicknames.example_en: Our classmates gave each other funny nicknames in elementary school.
nicknames.example_zh: 我們的同學在小學時互相取了有趣的綽號。

nightstand.example_en: She keeps a small lamp on her nightstand for reading.
nightstand.example_zh: 她在床頭櫃上放了一盞小燈用來看書。

nighttime.example_en: Owls are much more active during nighttime than in the day.
nighttime.example_zh: 貓頭鷹在夜晚比白天活躍得多。

nocturnal.example_en: Bats are nocturnal animals that sleep during the day.
nocturnal.example_zh: 蝙蝠是夜行性動物，白天會睡覺。

normally.example_en: I normally walk to school unless it's raining heavily.
normally.example_zh: 除非下大雨，否則我通常走路上學。

noticeably.example_en: The air feels noticeably cooler once the sun goes down.
noticeably.example_zh: 太陽下山後空氣明顯變得涼爽許多。

nutrients.example_en: Fruits and vegetables provide many nutrients our bodies need.
nutrients.example_zh: 蔬菜水果提供了我們身體所需的許多營養素。

obstacles.example_en: The runners had to jump over several obstacles on the track.
obstacles.example_zh: 跑者們必須跳過賽道上好幾個障礙物。

opponents.example_en: Our basketball team studied its opponents before the final game.
opponents.example_zh: 我們的籃球隊在決賽前研究了對手的打法。

outages.example_en: The storm caused power outages across the whole neighborhood.
outages.example_zh: 這場暴風雨導致整個社區停電。

outgoing.example_en: Her outgoing personality made it easy for her to make friends.
outgoing.example_zh: 她外向的個性讓她很容易交到朋友。

overall.example_en: Overall, the field trip was a great learning experience for everyone.
overall.example_zh: 整體而言，這次校外教學對大家來說都是很好的學習經驗。

overfishing.example_en: Overfishing has reduced the number of fish in many parts of the ocean.
overfishing.example_zh: 過度捕撈已經使海洋許多地方的魚群數量減少。

overjoyed.example_en: She was overjoyed when she found her lost cat safe at home.
overjoyed.example_zh: 她發現走失的貓平安在家時，欣喜若狂。

overwhelming.example_en: The amount of homework this week felt overwhelming to many students.
overwhelming.example_zh: 這星期的作業量讓許多學生感到難以承受。

packets.example_en: The teacher handed out packets of information before the field trip.
packets.example_zh: 老師在校外教學前發下了幾包資料。

paddle.example_en: We had to paddle hard to reach the other side of the lake.
paddle.example_zh: 我們得用力划槳才能到達湖的另一邊。

paddled.example_en: They paddled slowly along the calm river at sunset.
paddled.example_zh: 他們在日落時分沿著平靜的河流緩緩划船。

paddling.example_en: The kids enjoyed paddling around the lake in a small boat.
paddling.example_zh: 孩子們喜歡划著小船在湖上四處逛。

panicked.example_en: She panicked for a moment when she couldn't find her keys.
panicked.example_zh: 她找不到鑰匙時，一時之間感到很驚慌。

panicking.example_en: Stop panicking and just tell me what happened.
panicking.example_zh: 別再驚慌了，直接告訴我發生了什麼事。

parrotfish.example_en: The colorful parrotfish helps keep the coral reef clean.
parrotfish.example_zh: 色彩鮮豔的鸚哥魚有助於保持珊瑚礁的清潔。

participation.example_en: Active participation in class discussions can improve your grades.
participation.example_zh: 積極參與課堂討論可以提升你的成績。

particles.example_en: Dust particles floated in the sunlight coming through the window.
particles.example_zh: 灰塵粒子在從窗戶透進來的陽光中飄浮著。

pastries.example_en: The bakery sells fresh pastries every morning before school.
pastries.example_zh: 那家麵包店每天早上上學前都會賣新鮮的糕點。

pathway.example_en: A narrow pathway led through the forest to the waterfall.
pathway.example_zh: 一條狹窄的小徑穿過森林通往瀑布。

paws.example_en: The cat cleaned its paws after walking in the mud.
paws.example_zh: 那隻貓在泥地裡走過後清理了自己的爪子。

pedaled.example_en: He pedaled faster to catch up with his friends ahead.
pedaled.example_zh: 他加快踩踏板的速度，好追上前面的朋友。

pedals.example_en: She adjusted the bike pedals before starting her ride to school.
pedals.example_zh: 她在騎車上學前調整了腳踏車的踏板。

pedestrians.example_en: Drivers must always yield to pedestrians at the crosswalk.
pedestrians.example_zh: 駕駛在斑馬線前必須永遠禮讓行人。

peeked.example_en: She peeked into the box to see what her birthday gift was.
peeked.example_zh: 她偷看了盒子裡的東西，想知道生日禮物是什麼。

perked.example_en: The dog's ears perked up when it heard the front door open.
perked.example_zh: 狗聽到前門打開時，耳朵立刻豎了起來。

pheromones.example_en: Ants use pheromones to guide other ants toward food.
pheromones.example_zh: 螞蟻利用費洛蒙引導其他螞蟻找到食物。

physically.example_en: The long hike left everyone physically tired but happy.
physically.example_zh: 這趟長途健行讓大家身體上感到疲累卻很開心。

pollinate.example_en: Bees help pollinate flowers as they collect nectar.
pollinate.example_zh: 蜜蜂在採蜜的同時也幫助花朵授粉。

poorly.example_en: The team performed poorly in the first half of the game.
poorly.example_zh: 這支隊伍在比賽上半場表現不佳。

pottery.example_en: She took a class to learn how to make pottery by hand.
pottery.example_zh: 她上了一門課學習如何用手製作陶器。

pouches.example_en: Baby kangaroos stay safe inside their mothers' pouches.
pouches.example_zh: 小袋鼠安全地待在媽媽的育兒袋裡。

precisely.example_en: The recipe tells you precisely how much sugar to add.
precisely.example_zh: 這份食譜精確地告訴你要加多少糖。

predators.example_en: Small animals hide in the grass to avoid predators.
predators.example_zh: 小動物躲在草叢裡以避開掠食者。

previously.example_en: The area was previously covered with farmland before the city grew.
previously.example_zh: 這座城市擴張以前，這個地區先前是一片農地。

procrastination.example_en: Procrastination often makes homework feel more stressful than it is.
procrastination.example_zh: 拖延常常讓作業感覺比實際上更有壓力。

properly.example_en: Please store the leftover food properly in the refrigerator.
properly.example_zh: 請把剩下的食物正確地保存在冰箱裡。

published.example_en: The young author published her first book at age fifteen.
published.example_zh: 那位年輕作家在十五歲時出版了她的第一本書。

puffs.example_en: Small puffs of smoke rose from the chimney on cold mornings.
puffs.example_zh: 寒冷的早晨，煙囪冒出縷縷輕煙。

rainforests.example_en: Rainforests are home to millions of different plant and animal species.
rainforests.example_zh: 雨林是數百萬種不同動植物的棲息地。

rapidly.example_en: The city's population has grown rapidly over the past decade.
rapidly.example_zh: 過去十年間，這座城市的人口成長迅速。

reasonably.example_en: The store sells fresh vegetables at reasonably low prices.
reasonably.example_zh: 這家店以合理的低價出售新鮮蔬菜。

reassured.example_en: The coach reassured the nervous players before the big match.
reassured.example_zh: 教練在大賽前安撫了緊張的選手，讓他們安心。

recess.example_en: The students played basketball together during recess.
recess.example_zh: 學生們在下課休息時間一起打籃球。

recharge.example_en: I need to recharge my phone before we leave the house.
recharge.example_zh: 我出門前需要幫手機充電。

rechecked.example_en: She rechecked her answers before turning in the test.
rechecked.example_zh: 她在交卷前再次檢查了自己的答案。

recital.example_en: My little sister will perform in a piano recital next week.
recital.example_zh: 我妹妹下星期將在鋼琴演奏會上表演。

recyclable.example_en: Please separate the recyclable materials from the regular trash.
recyclable.example_zh: 請把可回收的材料和一般垃圾分開。

reddish.example_en: The sky turned a reddish color just before sunset.
reddish.example_zh: 日落前，天空變成了微紅的顏色。

reflex.example_en: Blinking when something flies toward your eye is a natural reflex.
reflex.example_zh: 當有東西飛向眼睛時眨眼是一種自然的反射動作。

refreshed.example_en: She felt refreshed after a short nap in the afternoon.
refreshed.example_zh: 下午小睡片刻後，她感覺神清氣爽。

relaxed.example_en: Listening to music helps me feel relaxed after a busy day.
relaxed.example_zh: 聽音樂能讓我在忙碌的一天後感到放鬆。

removing.example_en: He spent the afternoon removing weeds from the garden.
removing.example_zh: 他花了一下午的時間清除花園裡的雜草。

renewals.example_en: The library sends reminders about book renewals every week.
renewals.example_zh: 圖書館每星期都會寄出借書續借的提醒通知。

reorganizing.example_en: We spent the weekend reorganizing the bookshelves in the classroom.
reorganizing.example_zh: 我們花了整個週末重新整理教室裡的書架。

replaced.example_en: The old streetlights were replaced with brighter, energy-saving ones.
replaced.example_zh: 舊的路燈已被更明亮、更省電的路燈取代。

replaces.example_en: This new app replaces the old one that kept crashing.
replaces.example_zh: 這個新的應用程式取代了那個常常當機的舊版本。

represented.example_en: Our school was represented by three students at the science fair.
represented.example_zh: 我們學校由三位學生代表參加科學展覽。

residents.example_en: Local residents gathered to discuss the new park project.
residents.example_zh: 當地居民聚集起來討論新公園的計畫。

responsibly.example_en: Students are expected to use the school computers responsibly.
responsibly.example_zh: 學生被期望要負責任地使用學校的電腦。

responsive.example_en: The new website is more responsive on mobile phones.
responsive.example_zh: 這個新網站在手機上的反應更靈敏了。

retired.example_en: My retired grandfather now spends his time gardening.
retired.example_zh: 我退休的爺爺現在把時間都花在園藝上。

reusable.example_en: She always brings a reusable bottle instead of buying plastic ones.
reusable.example_zh: 她總是自帶可重複使用的水瓶，而不是買塑膠瓶裝水。

reveals.example_en: The last chapter of the book reveals a surprising secret.
reveals.example_zh: 這本書的最後一章揭露了一個驚人的秘密。

reversed.example_en: The driver reversed the car carefully out of the narrow space.
reversed.example_zh: 駕駛小心地將車子從狹窄的空間倒車出來。

riddles.example_en: The children took turns telling riddles around the campfire.
riddles.example_zh: 孩子們輪流在營火旁講謎語。

roaring.example_en: We heard the roaring sound of the waterfall before we saw it.
roaring.example_zh: 我們在看到瀑布之前，就先聽到了它轟隆的聲音。

robotics.example_en: Our school started a robotics club last semester.
robotics.example_zh: 我們學校上學期成立了一個機器人社團。

roosters.example_en: The roosters on the farm crow loudly every morning.
roosters.example_zh: 農場裡的公雞每天早上都會大聲啼叫。

sank.example_en: The small paper boat sank slowly to the bottom of the tub.
sank.example_zh: 那艘小紙船緩緩沉到了浴缸底部。

scarier.example_en: This story is scarier than the one we read last week.
scarier.example_zh: 這個故事比我們上星期讀的那個更可怕。

scavenger.example_en: The class went on a scavenger hunt around the school garden.
scavenger.example_zh: 全班到學校花園進行了一場尋寶遊戲。

scent.example_en: The sweet scent of flowers filled the whole garden.
scent.example_zh: 花朵的甜香瀰漫了整個花園。

scissors.example_en: Please use the scissors carefully during art class.
scissors.example_zh: 美術課時請小心使用剪刀。

screws.example_en: He tightened the loose screws on the wooden chair.
screws.example_zh: 他把木椅上鬆掉的螺絲鎖緊了。

seafloor.example_en: Strange creatures live near the deepest parts of the seafloor.
seafloor.example_zh: 奇特的生物生活在海底最深處附近。

secretly.example_en: They secretly planned a surprise party for their teacher.
secretly.example_zh: 他們秘密地為老師策劃了一場驚喜派對。

seedlings.example_en: The students planted seedlings in the school garden this morning.
seedlings.example_zh: 學生們今天早上在學校花園裡種下了幼苗。

series.example_en: She is reading a popular series of fantasy novels.
series.example_zh: 她正在讀一套很受歡迎的奇幻小說系列。

seriously.example_en: You should take your health seriously and get enough sleep.
seriously.example_zh: 你應該認真看待自己的健康，並睡眠充足。

shades.example_en: The painting used many different shades of blue and green.
shades.example_zh: 這幅畫用了許多不同的藍色與綠色色調。

shakier.example_en: His handwriting looked shakier than usual after the long exam.
shakier.example_zh: 考完長時間的考試後，他的字跡看起來比平常更顫抖。

shaky.example_en: Her voice was shaky as she began her first public speech.
shaky.example_zh: 她開始第一次公開演講時，聲音顫抖著。

shortening.example_en: The tailor is shortening the sleeves of my new jacket.
shortening.example_zh: 裁縫師正在把我新外套的袖子改短。

shown.example_en: Studies have shown that exercise improves concentration in class.
shown.example_zh: 研究已經顯示運動能提升上課的專注力。

showtime.example_en: The actors got ready backstage a few minutes before showtime.
showtime.example_zh: 演員們在開演前幾分鐘在後台做準備。

shyly.example_en: The new student shyly introduced herself to the class.
shyly.example_zh: 新來的學生害羞地向全班自我介紹。

siblings.example_en: I have two siblings, an older brother and a younger sister.
siblings.example_zh: 我有兩個兄弟姊妹，一個哥哥和一個妹妹。

slightly.example_en: The soup tastes slightly sweeter than I expected.
slightly.example_zh: 這道湯的味道比我想像中稍微甜一點。

smoothly.example_en: The school event ran smoothly thanks to careful planning.
smoothly.example_zh: 由於仔細的規劃，這場校園活動進行得很順利。

sourdough.example_en: My father keeps a sourdough starter in the kitchen.
sourdough.example_zh: 我爸爸在廚房裡養著一份酸麵團酵種。

specifically.example_en: The teacher specifically asked us to write in complete sentences.
specifically.example_zh: 老師特別要求我們用完整的句子寫作。

splattered.example_en: Paint splattered across the table when the jar tipped over.
splattered.example_zh: 顏料罐子打翻時，油漆濺得桌上到處都是。

spooky.example_en: The old house at the end of the road looks spooky at night.
spooky.example_zh: 路底那棟老房子在夜晚看起來很陰森。

sprang.example_en: The cat sprang onto the windowsill to watch the birds.
sprang.example_zh: 那隻貓跳到窗台上看鳥。

spraying.example_en: The gardener was spraying water on the flowers early in the morning.
spraying.example_zh: 園丁一大早就在為花朵噴水澆灌。

squeaky.example_en: The squeaky door woke everyone up in the middle of the night.
squeaky.example_zh: 那扇吱吱作響的門在半夜把大家都吵醒了。

starters.example_en: Bakers often share their sourdough starters with friends.
starters.example_zh: 麵包師傅常常會把自己的酸麵酵種分享給朋友。

steadily.example_en: Her grades have improved steadily since she joined the study group.
steadily.example_zh: 自從她加入讀書小組後，成績穩定地進步。

stillness.example_en: There was a peaceful stillness in the forest early that morning.
stillness.example_zh: 那天清晨，森林裡籠罩著一片寧靜。

storefront.example_en: The small bakery has a bright yellow storefront.
storefront.example_zh: 那間小麵包店有著明亮的黃色店面。

strands.example_en: A few strands of hair fell across her face in the wind.
strands.example_zh: 風吹得幾縷頭髮垂落在她的臉上。

strangely.example_en: The dog acted strangely quiet during the whole storm.
strangely.example_zh: 那隻狗在整場暴風雨中表現得異常安靜。

strategies.example_en: The coach explained several strategies before the championship game.
strategies.example_zh: 教練在冠軍賽前說明了好幾種策略。

stray.example_en: A friendly stray dog followed us all the way home.
stray.example_zh: 一隻友善的流浪狗一路跟著我們回家。

streetlight.example_en: We met under the streetlight outside the convenience store.
streetlight.example_zh: 我們在便利商店外的路燈下碰面。

streetlights.example_en: All the streetlights on our road turned on at the same time.
streetlights.example_zh: 我們這條路上的路燈同時亮了起來。

stretching.example_en: We spent five minutes stretching before starting gym class.
stretching.example_zh: 體育課開始前，我們花了五分鐘做伸展運動。

strontium.example_en: Strontium is used to make the bright red color in some fireworks.
strontium.example_zh: 鍶被用來製造某些煙火中鮮豔的紅色。

stuck.example_en: My bike got stuck in the mud after the heavy rain.
stuck.example_zh: 大雨過後，我的腳踏車卡在泥地裡動彈不得。

stung.example_en: A bee stung him on the arm while he was gardening.
stung.example_zh: 他做園藝時，手臂被一隻蜜蜂叮了一口。

stunned.example_en: The whole class was stunned by the sudden news.
stunned.example_zh: 全班都被這則突如其來的消息震驚了。

submitted.example_en: She submitted her science project a day before the deadline.
submitted.example_zh: 她在截止日期前一天提交了科學專題作業。

substances.example_en: Some cleaning substances can be harmful if mixed together.
substances.example_zh: 有些清潔物質如果混在一起可能會有害。

subtle.example_en: There was a subtle change in her tone during the phone call.
subtle.example_zh: 她講電話時的語氣有一個微妙的變化。

superhero.example_en: My little brother dressed up as his favorite superhero for the party.
superhero.example_zh: 我弟弟為了派對打扮成他最喜歡的超級英雄。

supposed.example_en: We were supposed to meet at the library at four o'clock.
supposed.example_zh: 我們原本應該四點在圖書館碰面。

surfboard.example_en: He carried his surfboard down to the beach early in the morning.
surfboard.example_zh: 他一大早就扛著衝浪板走向海灘。

surprisingly.example_en: The math test was surprisingly easy compared to last week's.
surprisingly.example_zh: 這次數學考試比上星期的意外地簡單許多。

surrounded.example_en: The small village was surrounded by tall green mountains.
surrounded.example_zh: 這座小村莊被高聳的綠色山脈所包圍。

surrounding.example_en: The hikers admired the surrounding scenery from the top of the hill.
surrounding.example_zh: 登山客站在山頂欣賞周圍的景色。

suspected.example_en: The teacher suspected that someone had copied the homework answers.
suspected.example_zh: 老師懷疑有人抄襲了作業答案。

switching.example_en: He kept switching channels because nothing interesting was on TV.
switching.example_zh: 他一直在切換電視頻道，因為沒有節目吸引他。

symbolize.example_en: White doves often symbolize peace in many cultures.
symbolize.example_zh: 白鴿在許多文化中常常象徵和平。

symbolized.example_en: The old bridge symbolized the connection between the two towns.
symbolized.example_zh: 那座老橋象徵著兩座城鎮之間的連結。

symbolizes.example_en: The red lantern symbolizes good luck during the festival.
symbolizes.example_zh: 紅燈籠在這個節日裡象徵著好運。

tangled.example_en: Her hair was tangled after playing outside in the wind.
tangled.example_zh: 她在風中玩耍後，頭髮變得纏在一起。

tangling.example_en: The kite string kept tangling around the tree branches.
tangling.example_zh: 風箏線一直纏繞在樹枝上。

tangy.example_en: The salad had a tangy lemon dressing that everyone loved.
tangy.example_zh: 這份沙拉淋上帶有酸味的檸檬醬，大家都很喜歡。

teahouse.example_en: We spent the afternoon relaxing at a small teahouse in the old street.
teahouse.example_zh: 我們在老街的一間小茶館裡度過了悠閒的下午。

teasing.example_en: Stop teasing your little brother about his new glasses.
teasing.example_zh: 別再拿弟弟的新眼鏡逗他了。

tectonic.example_en: The earthquake was caused by the movement of tectonic plates.
tectonic.example_zh: 這場地震是由板塊構造運動所引起的。

tenth.example_en: This is the tenth time she has read that book.
tenth.example_zh: 這已經是她第十次讀那本書了。

texture.example_en: The cake had a soft, fluffy texture that melted in your mouth.
texture.example_zh: 這個蛋糕的質地鬆軟，入口即化。

thankfully.example_en: Thankfully, the rain stopped before the outdoor concert began.
thankfully.example_zh: 幸虧戶外演唱會開始前雨就停了。

thoughtfully.example_en: She thoughtfully packed extra snacks for everyone on the trip.
thoughtfully.example_zh: 她體貼地為旅行中的每個人多準備了點心。

threatening.example_en: Dark, threatening clouds gathered above the mountains before the storm.
threatening.example_zh: 暴風雨來臨前，山上聚集了陰沉威脅的烏雲。

threats.example_en: Pollution is one of the biggest threats to marine life.
threats.example_zh: 污染是海洋生物面臨的最大威脅之一。

thrilled.example_en: The whole team was thrilled after winning the championship.
thrilled.example_zh: 全隊在贏得冠軍後都感到非常興奮。

transform.example_en: A caterpillar can transform into a beautiful butterfly.
transform.example_zh: 毛毛蟲可以轉變成美麗的蝴蝶。

trembled.example_en: His voice trembled slightly as he read his speech aloud.
trembled.example_zh: 他朗讀演講稿時，聲音微微顫抖。

trustworthy.example_en: A good friend should always be honest and trustworthy.
trustworthy.example_zh: 一個好朋友應該永遠誠實且值得信賴。

tucked.example_en: She tucked the letter into her backpack before leaving home.
tucked.example_zh: 她出門前把那封信塞進了背包裡。

twisted.example_en: The old tree had a thick, twisted trunk covered in moss.
twisted.example_zh: 那棵老樹有著粗壯扭曲、佈滿青苔的樹幹。

unavailable.example_en: The book I wanted was unavailable at the school library.
unavailable.example_zh: 我想借的那本書在學校圖書館裡沒有。

uncontrollable.example_en: She burst into uncontrollable laughter during the funny movie.
uncontrollable.example_zh: 她在看這部搞笑電影時忍不住大笑。

underneath.example_en: The cat was sleeping underneath the wooden table.
underneath.example_zh: 那隻貓正在木桌底下睡覺。

unexpected.example_en: We received an unexpected visit from our old neighbors.
unexpected.example_zh: 我們收到了老鄰居意料之外的來訪。

unfairly.example_en: The players felt they were treated unfairly by the referee.
unfairly.example_zh: 球員們覺得裁判對他們不公平。

unfamiliar.example_en: We got lost in an unfamiliar part of the city.
unfamiliar.example_zh: 我們在這座城市不熟悉的區域迷路了。

unfold.example_en: She carefully unfolded the old map on the table.
unfold.example_zh: 她小心翼翼地在桌上攤開那張舊地圖。

unfolded.example_en: The story unfolded slowly as more clues were discovered.
unfolded.example_zh: 隨著更多線索被發現，故事慢慢展開。

unfortunately.example_en: Unfortunately, the outdoor concert was canceled because of the storm.
unfortunately.example_zh: 很不幸地，戶外演唱會因為暴風雨而取消了。

unimportant.example_en: He ignored the unimportant details and focused on the main idea.
unimportant.example_zh: 他忽略了不重要的細節，專注在主要重點上。

unnatural.example_en: The bright orange color of the drink looked a bit unnatural.
unnatural.example_zh: 那杯飲料鮮豔的橘色看起來有點不自然。

unrealistic.example_en: Setting unrealistic goals can make you feel discouraged quickly.
unrealistic.example_zh: 設定不切實際的目標會讓你很快感到氣餒。

unsafe.example_en: The old bridge was closed because it was considered unsafe.
unsafe.example_zh: 那座老橋因為被認為不安全而封閉。

unsure.example_en: She was unsure which club to join at the start of the year.
unsure.example_zh: 學期開始時，她不確定要加入哪個社團。

unsurprised.example_en: He looked unsurprised when his team won again.
unsurprised.example_zh: 他的球隊再次獲勝時，他看起來並不驚訝。

unused.example_en: There were several unused notebooks in the back of the drawer.
unused.example_zh: 抽屜後面有好幾本沒用過的筆記本。

unwanted.example_en: We donated our unwanted clothes to the local charity shop.
unwanted.example_zh: 我們把不需要的衣服捐給了當地的慈善商店。

update.example_en: The school sent an update about the schedule for next week.
update.example_zh: 學校寄來了一則關於下星期行程的更新通知。

updates.example_en: She checks her phone for weather updates every morning.
updates.example_zh: 她每天早上都會查看手機上的天氣更新。

upright.example_en: Please keep your seat in the upright position during landing.
upright.example_zh: 降落時請保持座椅直立。

upside.example_en: The picture accidentally hung upside down on the wall.
upside.example_zh: 那幅畫不小心倒掛在牆上了。

uselessly.example_en: He waved his arms uselessly, trying to stop the bus.
uselessly.example_zh: 他徒勞地揮動手臂，試圖攔下公車。

variety.example_en: The cafeteria offers a wide variety of healthy lunch options.
variety.example_zh: 自助餐廳提供了多樣化的健康午餐選擇。

vehicles.example_en: Electric vehicles are becoming more common on city streets.
vehicles.example_zh: 電動車在市區街道上變得越來越常見。

vessels.example_en: Several fishing vessels returned to the harbor before the storm.
vessels.example_zh: 暴風雨來臨前，幾艘漁船返回了港口。

villagers.example_en: The villagers gathered every year to celebrate the harvest festival.
villagers.example_zh: 村民們每年都會聚集起來慶祝豐收節。

violently.example_en: The tree branches shook violently in the strong wind.
violently.example_zh: 強風中樹枝猛烈地搖晃著。

vivid.example_en: She gave a vivid description of her trip to the mountains.
vivid.example_zh: 她生動地描述了她的山區旅行。

wag.example_en: Dogs often wag their tails when they are happy to see you.
wag.example_zh: 狗看到你很開心時常常會搖尾巴。

wagged.example_en: The puppy wagged its tail excitedly at the door.
wagged.example_zh: 那隻小狗在門口興奮地搖著尾巴。

wagging.example_en: The dog came running with its tail wagging happily.
wagging.example_zh: 那隻狗跑過來，開心地搖著尾巴。

wags.example_en: My dog always wags its tail when I come home from school.
wags.example_zh: 我從學校回家時，我的狗總是會搖尾巴。

wandered.example_en: We wandered through the old streets without any particular plan.
wandered.example_zh: 我們漫無目的地在古老的街道上閒逛。

wandering.example_en: The lost cat was found wandering near the school gate.
wandering.example_zh: 那隻走失的貓被發現在校門口附近遊蕩。

warmly.example_en: The host welcomed all the guests warmly at the door.
warmly.example_zh: 主人在門口熱情地歡迎所有賓客。

websites.example_en: Students can find useful information on many educational websites.
websites.example_zh: 學生可以在許多教育網站上找到有用的資訊。

weeds.example_en: My father pulls weeds from the garden every weekend.
weeds.example_zh: 我爸爸每個週末都會拔除花園裡的雜草。

weedy.example_en: The weedy field behind the school hasn't been cleaned in months.
weedy.example_zh: 學校後面那片雜草叢生的空地已經好幾個月沒有清理了。

wildlife.example_en: The national park protects a wide variety of wildlife.
wildlife.example_zh: 這座國家公園保護了各式各樣的野生動物。

wiping.example_en: She was wiping the whiteboard clean before the next class.
wiping.example_zh: 她在下一堂課開始前把白板擦乾淨。

wobbled.example_en: The old table wobbled every time someone leaned on it.
wobbled.example_zh: 每次有人靠在那張舊桌子上，它就會搖晃。

wobbles.example_en: One leg of the chair is shorter, so it always wobbles.
wobbles.example_zh: 這張椅子有一隻腳比較短，所以總是會搖晃。

wobbly.example_en: The little boy took wobbly steps as he learned to walk.
wobbly.example_zh: 小男孩學走路時，腳步搖搖晃晃的。

woke.example_en: She woke up early to watch the sunrise from the balcony.
woke.example_zh: 她早早醒來，在陽台上看日出。

workdays.example_en: My parents are usually too tired to cook on busy workdays.
workdays.example_zh: 我爸媽在忙碌的工作日通常都太累而無法煮飯。

worldwide.example_en: The singer became famous worldwide after her first album.
worldwide.example_zh: 那位歌手在發行第一張專輯後在全世界爆紅。

wrapped.example_en: She wrapped the birthday present in shiny blue paper.
wrapped.example_zh: 她用亮藍色的紙包裝生日禮物。

wrinkled.example_en: His shirt looked wrinkled after being packed in the suitcase.
wrinkled.example_zh: 他的襯衫被放進行李箱後看起來皺皺的。

zippers.example_en: The backpack has three separate pockets with different zippers.
zippers.example_zh: 這個背包有三個獨立的口袋，各自有不同的拉鍊。

zongzi.example_en: Every year, our family wraps zongzi together before the Dragon Boat Festival.
zongzi.example_zh: 每年端午節前，我們全家會一起包粽子。

zookeepers.example_en: The zookeepers feed the pandas fresh bamboo every morning.
zookeepers.example_zh: 動物園管理員每天早上都會餵熊貓新鮮的竹子。
